items.question: How can I get a treatment plan?
items.answer: You can complete the free consultation form or contact ARZ Health on WhatsApp. A patient consultant will collect your request and help coordinate the next medical evaluation step.

items.question: Do you support international patients?
items.answer: Yes. ARZ Health focuses on international patient support for people traveling to Istanbul for dental, aesthetic and hair transplantation services.

items.question: Where are you located in Istanbul?
items.answer: ARZ Health is based in Maslak, Sariyer, Istanbul at Maslak, Sümer Sokağı No: 1/B, 34485 Sarıyer / Istanbul.

items.question: Can you help with hotel and transfer?
items.answer: ARZ Health can assist with orientation and coordination for airport transfer, accommodation options and clinic appointments.

items.question: Which languages do you support?
items.answer: The website supports English, Turkish and Arabic. Patient communication pathways can also be arranged according to availability.

items.question: How can I contact ARZ Health?
items.answer: You can use the consultation form, WhatsApp button or contact details listed in the footer.

items.question: Are treatment results guaranteed?
items.answer: No medical result can be guaranteed. Treatment outcomes may vary depending on each patient's medical condition, expectations and treatment plan.

faqs.question: Can I share dental photos before traveling?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can upload or share photos for preliminary consultation guidance. A final plan requires professional dental evaluation.

faqs.question: How long do dental treatments take?
faqs.answer: Timing depends on the treatment type, oral health and medical planning. Your consultant can explain the expected appointment flow after evaluation.

faqs.question: Can I combine dental care with travel support?
faqs.answer: ARZ Health can help coordinate appointment timing, hotel orientation and transfer support.

aesthetic.title: Aesthetic Treatments in Istanbul
aesthetic.description: Aesthetic consultation and coordination for facial aesthetics, body aesthetics and non-surgical procedures.
aesthetic.overview: Every aesthetic request should be evaluated individually by qualified healthcare professionals. ARZ Health supports communication, appointment coordination and realistic expectation setting.

faqs.question: Can aesthetic procedures be planned remotely?
faqs.answer: Initial consultation can begin online, but suitability and final medical decisions require qualified medical evaluation.

faqs.question: Do you provide safety information?
faqs.answer: ARZ Health helps patients ask the right questions and understand preparation, recovery and appointment steps.

faqs.question: Are outcomes guaranteed?
faqs.answer: No. Outcomes vary by patient, medical condition, procedure type and treatment plan.

hair.title: Hair Transplantation in Istanbul
hair.description: FUE, DHI, beard transplant and hairline planning support with consultation and recovery communication.
hair.overview: ARZ Health coordinates consultation steps for patients considering hair transplantation in Istanbul, including planning, travel orientation and follow-up communication.

faqs.question: Which technique is right for me?
faqs.answer: FUE or DHI suitability depends on your donor area, hair goals and medical evaluation.

faqs.question: Can you help after the procedure?
faqs.answer: ARZ Health supports follow-up communication and helps patients understand recommended recovery steps.

faqs.question: Will results look natural?
faqs.answer: Planning aims for a natural-looking appearance, but individual outcomes vary and require medical assessment.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
paragraphs: ARZ Health may collect personal information that you voluntarily submit through contact forms, WhatsApp links, email or direct communication. This may include your full name, country, phone number, WhatsApp number, email address, preferred language, treatment interest, message content and optional images shared for preliminary consultation purposes.

This information is processed to respond to consultation requests, organize patient communication, coordinate appointments, support travel-related arrangements and keep records of communication where necessary. Health-related information and images may be considered sensitive personal data and should only be shared when you consent to ARZ Health reviewing them for consultation coordination.

ARZ Health does not sell personal information. Information may be shared with authorized patient consultants, contracted service providers and relevant healthcare professionals only when necessary to evaluate your request or organize services. Final medical evaluation is performed by qualified healthcare professionals.

Personal information is retained only for as long as reasonably necessary for consultation, legal, operational and patient communication purposes. You may contact ARZ Health to request access, correction or deletion of your information, subject to applicable legal obligations.

By submitting a consultation request, you confirm that the information you provide is accurate and that you agree to be contacted regarding your request. This policy may be updated when service processes, legal requirements or communication channels change.
privacy.description: How ARZ Health collects, uses and protects consultation information submitted through this website.

terms.title: Terms of Use
paragraphs: This website provides general information about ARZ Health and its international patient coordination services in Istanbul. Website content is not a medical diagnosis, treatment recommendation or emergency healthcare service.

Submitting a form, sending a WhatsApp message or requesting information does not create a doctor-patient relationship with ARZ Health. Treatment suitability, risks, timing, pricing and final decisions must be confirmed after evaluation by qualified healthcare professionals.

Users agree to provide accurate contact and health-related information when requesting consultation. ARZ Health may decline, pause or redirect a request when information is incomplete, inappropriate for remote review or outside the scope of available coordination services.

Travel, accommodation, transfer and appointment assistance are coordination services. Availability, schedules and third-party service conditions may vary. ARZ Health is not responsible for decisions made independently by third-party providers.
All website text, layout, branding and visual materials belong to ARZ Health or are used under applicable rights. They may not be copied, reused or represented as another brand without permission.
terms.description: Terms governing the use of the ARZ Health website and consultation request channels.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
paragraphs: The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical consultation, diagnosis or treatment.

No medical result, aesthetic outcome, hair density, dental result, recovery period or success rate can be guaranteed. Outcomes may vary depending on each patient’s medical condition, anatomy, expectations, treatment plan, aftercare and professional evaluation.

Before any treatment, patients must be evaluated by qualified healthcare professionals. Final decisions about suitability, technique, medication, anesthesia, surgery, recovery and follow-up belong to the responsible healthcare professionals.
Before/after visuals, testimonials and treatment descriptions are for informational context only. They should not be interpreted as a promise of identical results.
For urgent medical symptoms or emergencies, contact local emergency services or a qualified healthcare provider immediately.
disclaimer.description: Important medical limitations and patient safety information for website visitors.

footer.description: ARZ Health supports international patients seeking dental treatments, aesthetic procedures and hair transplantation in Maslak, Istanbul.
